g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the client connect via WebSocket vs REST?')
sendPrompt('What does the API gateway do for auth and tracing?')
g.text: JWT validation · rate limiting · OTEL trace injection · SSE passthrough

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does context hydration work with the user profile?')
g.text: Fetch user profile + 7d memory + constraint rules → inject into state

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the mode classifier distinguish free-flow from action flow?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the free-flow LLM path?')
g.text: LLM call · no tools · domain context injected

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the router agent plan which domain agents to call?')
sendPrompt('How does LangGraph Send API enable parallel agent execution?')
g.text: LangGraph Send API · all agents fire concurrently

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools does the nutrition agent have?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the fitness agent have?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the medical agent have?')
sendPrompt('How does the tool result aggregator merge cross-domain outputs?')
g.text: Merge domains · detect conflicts · idempotency check
